approvalDashboard.title: Approval Dashboard
approvalDashboard.description: Review and manage approval workflows for expenses and invoices
approvalDashboard.no_pending_approvals_description: You're all caught up! There are no items waiting for your review at the moment.
approvalDashboard.no_processed_expenses_description: You haven't approved or rejected any expenses yet. Your approval history will appear here.
approvalDashboard.no_processed_invoices_description: You haven't approved or rejected any invoices yet. Your approval history will appear here.
approvalDashboard.no_pending_invoice_approvals_description: All invoice approvals are up to date.
approvalDashboard.no_approvals_match_your_search_criteria: No approvals match your search criteria
approvalDashboard.not_approved_rejected: You haven't approved or rejected any items yet.
approvalDashboard.items_approved_rejected: Expenses and invoices already approved or rejected
approvalDashboard.search_invoices_placeholder: Search by invoice number or client...

submit_approval.title: Submit for Approval
submit_approval.content: Once you submit an expense for approval, you cannot edit it. Make sure all information is correct and receipts are uploaded before submitting.

approval_status.title: Approval Status
approval_status.content: Track your expense through the approval process. Status shows: Pending (waiting for review), Approved (ready for reimbursement), or Rejected (needs corrections).

required_fields.title: Required Information
required_fields.content: All fields marked with * are required for approval submission. Missing information will prevent submission and delay processing.

tips: Ensure all required fields are completed before submitting
Upload clear, legible receipts for all expenses
Provide detailed business justification in descriptions
Review expense policy limits before submission

approve_button.title: Approve Expense
approve_button.content: Click to approve this expense. You can add optional notes that will be sent to the employee. Approval cannot be undone.

reject_button.title: Reject Expense
reject_button.content: Reject this expense with a required reason. The employee will receive your feedback and can resubmit after making corrections.

expense_details.title: Review Details
expense_details.content: Carefully review all expense information, receipts, and documentation before making your decision. Check for policy compliance.

approval_history.title: Approval History
approval_history.content: View the complete approval timeline. For multi-level approvals, see who has already approved and who needs to approve next.

tips: Review all expense details and supporting documentation
Check expense compliance with company policies
Provide clear feedback when rejecting expenses
Use delegation when you will be unavailable

pending_count.title: Pending Approvals
pending_count.content: Number of expenses waiting for your approval. Click to see the full list and prioritize your reviews.

filter_options.title: Filter & Sort Options
filter_options.content: Use filters to find specific expenses by amount, date, employee, or category. Sort by urgency or submission date.

bulk_actions.title: Bulk Actions
bulk_actions.content: Select multiple expenses to approve similar items at once. Use carefully and only for routine, policy-compliant expenses.

delegation_status.title: Delegation Active
delegation_status.content: You have active delegation settings. Some approvals may be handled by your delegate during the specified period.

tips: Use filters to prioritize urgent approvals
Set up notifications for timely approval processing
Review approval analytics to identify bottlenecks
Configure delegation before planned absences

rule_priority.title: Rule Priority
rule_priority.content: Higher priority numbers are evaluated first. Use priority to ensure specific rules override general ones.

amount_ranges.title: Amount Ranges
amount_ranges.content: Set minimum and maximum amounts for this rule. Avoid gaps between rules to ensure all expenses have an approver.

category_filter.title: Category Filter
category_filter.content: Specify which expense categories this rule applies to. Leave empty to apply to all categories within the amount range.

approval_levels.title: Approval Levels
approval_levels.content: Level 1 is the first approver, Level 2 is second, etc. Create multiple rules with the same amount range for multi-level approval.

auto_approval.title: Auto Approval
auto_approval.content: Expenses below this amount are automatically approved. Use for small, routine expenses to reduce approval workload.

tips: Test new rules before activating them
Avoid gaps in amount ranges between rules
Use priority to handle rule conflicts
Document rule changes for audit purposes

delegate_selection.title: Choose Delegate
delegate_selection.content: Select a trusted team member to handle approvals in your absence. They must have appropriate permissions and knowledge of policies.

delegation_period.title: Delegation Period
delegation_period.content: Set specific start and end dates for delegation. Delegation automatically expires at the end date for security.

delegation_scope.title: Delegation Scope
delegation_scope.content: Choose whether to delegate all approvals or only specific types (amount limits, categories). Partial delegation maintains control.

notification_settings.title: Delegation Notifications
notification_settings.content: Configure whether you receive copies of approval decisions made by your delegate. Recommended for audit purposes.

tips: Choose delegates with appropriate knowledge and permissions
Set specific start and end dates for security
Configure notification preferences for oversight
Review delegation effectiveness regularly

banner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our use of cookies.
banner.acceptAriaLabel: Accept all cookies and dismiss this banner
banner.manageAriaLabel: Open cookie preferences to customize your choices
banner.acceptedAnnouncement: All cookies have been accepted. The banner has been dismissed.
banner.keyboardInstructions: Use Tab to navigate between buttons. Press Escape to focus on Manage Preferences. Press Enter or Space to activate buttons.

preferences.title: Cookie Preferences
preferences.description: Manage your cookie preferences. You can enable or disable different types of cookies below.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website performance.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to deliver advertisements more relevant to you and your interests. They may also be used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement.

settings.title: Cookie Preferences
settings.description: Manage your cookie and tracking preferences. These settings control how we collect and use data to improve your experience.
settings.upToDate: Your preferences are saved and up to date

infoPoints.stored: Your preferences are stored locally and will be remembered for future visits
infoPoints.changeable: You can change these settings at any time
infoPoints.functionality: Some features may not work properly if certain cookies are disabled
infoPoints.compliance: We comply with GDPR and other privacy regulations

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Essential cookies required for the website to function properly. These include authentication, security, and basic functionality cookies that cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how you use our website by collecting anonymous usage statistics. This includes page views, user interactions, and performance metrics.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to track visitors across websites and show relevant advertisements. This includes conversion tracking, remarketing, and personalized ad delivery.

messages.resetInfo: Changes reset to last saved preferences

emailIntegration.title: Email Integration
emailIntegration.description: Configure IMAP settings to automatically ingest expenses from your email. The system will scan for receipts and invoices in the specified folders.

gmailAlert.title: Gmail Configuration
gmailAlert.description: Gmail requires an App Password to connect via IMAP. Your regular password will not work.
gmailAlert.step1: 1. Enable 2-Step Verification in your Google Account.
gmailAlert.step3: 3. Generate a new password for "Mail" and use it below.

emailIntegration.passwordHint: For Gmail, use an App Password.
emailIntegration.allowedSendersHint: Comma separated list of email addresses. Leave empty to allow all.
emailIntegration.lookbackDaysHint: How many days back to search for emails (default: 30).
